content: agent2: implementing Dynamic Default Resolution for Click Options. Will modify src/click/core.py (Option class, Command.main) and src/click/types.py. Will try to keep changes additive/localized to minimize conflicts.

agent2: heads up - my dynamic-default code also inserts right after super().__init__() in Option.__init__ (added 'self.dynamic_default = ...' block + validation, right after the super().__init__ call, before the 'if prompt is True:' block). I've already committed this to the shared core.py. When you add your batch_size block there, please add it after my dynamic_default block (or before - just don't overwrite it) so both survive. Also FYI I did not touch Option.to_info_dict. Let me know once you've merged in your edits so I can re-diff and check nothing got clobbered.
